'''womazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:woeless|woeless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woeless|woeless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| womazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:womazithi|womazithi]] || [[word:womaziji|womaziji]] || [[word:womazishi|womazishi]] || [[word:womaziki|womaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:womazuthuthu|womazuthuthu]] || [[word:womazujuju|womazujuju]] || [[word:womazushushu|womazushushu]] || [[word:womazukuku|womazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:womazuthu|womazuthu]] || [[word:womazuju|womazuju]] || [[word:womazushu|womazushu]] || [[word:womazuku|womazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:womazufthuf|womazufthuf]] || [[word:womazufjuf|womazufjuf]] || [[word:womazufshuf|womazufshuf]] || [[word:womazufkuf|womazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:womazethe|womazethe]] || [[word:womazeje|womazeje]] || [[word:womazeshe|womazeshe]] || [[word:womazeke|womazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:womazothotho|womazothotho]] || [[word:womazojojo|womazojojo]] || [[word:womazoshosho|womazoshosho]] || [[word:womazokoko|womazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:womazotho|womazotho]] || [[word:womazojo|womazojo]] || [[word:womazosho|womazosho]] || [[word:womazoko|womazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:womazofthof|womazofthof]] || [[word:womazofjof|womazofjof]] || [[word:womazofshof|womazofshof]] || [[word:womazofkof|womazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:womazÃŸfthÃŸf|womazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfjÃŸf|womazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfshÃŸf|womazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfkÃŸf|womazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:womazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|womazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|womazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|womazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|womazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:womazÃŸfthÃŸf|womazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfjÃŸf|womazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfshÃŸf|womazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfkÃŸf|womazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:womazÃŸfthÃŸf|womazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfjÃŸf|womazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfshÃŸf|womazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:womazÃŸfkÃŸf|womazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:womazÃḊthÃḊ|womazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:womazÃḊjÃḊ|womazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:womazÃḊshÃḊ|womazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:womazÃḊkÃḊ|womazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:womazathatha|womazathatha]] || [[word:womazajaja|womazajaja]] || [[word:womazashasha|womazashasha]] || [[word:womazakaka|womazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:womazatha|womazatha]] || [[word:womazaja|womazaja]] || [[word:womazasha|womazasha]] || [[word:womazaka|womazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:womazafthaf|womazafthaf]] || [[word:womazafjaf|womazafjaf]] || [[word:womazafshaf|womazafshaf]] || [[word:womazafkaf|womazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:womazasha|womazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:womazshÃḋsha|womazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:womazrosha|womazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:womazmusha|womazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:womazyasha|womazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowomaznkshÃḋsha|gowomaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowomaznkrosha|gowomaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowomaznkmusha|gowomaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowomaznkyasha|gowomaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:womamazasha|womamazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:womamazshÃḋsha|womamazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:womamazrosha|womamazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:womamazmusha|womamazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:womamazyasha|womamazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowomamaznkshÃḋsha|gowomamaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowomamaznkrosha|gowomamaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowomamaznkmusha|gowomamaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowomamaznkyasha|gowomamaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wemÃḊzasha|wemÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wemÃḊzshÃḋsha|wemÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wemÃḊzrosha|wemÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wemÃḊzmusha|wemÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wemÃḊzyasha|wemÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowemÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gowemÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowemÃḊznkrosha|gowemÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowemÃḊznkmusha|gowemÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowemÃḊznkyasha|gowemÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:womfazasha|womfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:womfazshÃḋsha|womfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:womfazrosha|womfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:womfazmusha|womfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:womfazyasha|womfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowomfaznkshÃḋsha|gowomfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowomfaznkrosha|gowomfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowomfaznkmusha|gowomfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowomfaznkyasha|gowomfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
